first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations, and the core reasoning remains unchanged. Both versions correctly identify the same critical gaps in the candidate's experience (insufficient C++ and large-scale cloud infrastructure experience). The minor variations in phrasing for strengths and concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not introduce any new substantive points or reflect a different assessment based on the location change.
